rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.24+commit.e11b9ed9"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"Panduan Verifikasi VoteChain di Basescan (Base Sepolia)","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Verifikasi contract di Foundry dilakukan langsung melalui command line (CLI)         menggunakan perintah `forge verify-contract`.  ================================================================================= CARA VERIFIKASI VIA TERMINAL: =================================================================================  Jalankan perintah berikut di terminal Anda pada direktori `contracts`:  1. Ambil file environment variable:    source .env  2. Jalankan verifikasi untuk VoteChainRegistry:    forge verify-contract \\      <ALAMAT_CONTRACT_YANG_DIDEPLOY> \\      src/VoteChainRegistry.sol:VoteChainRegistry \\      --rpc-url $BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL \\      --etherscan-api-key $BASESCAN_API_KEY \\      --watch  3. Jika Anda ingin memverifikasi ElectionSpace yang dibuat secara dinamis oleh registry:    forge verify-contract \\      <ALAMAT_CONTRACT_ELECTION_SPACE> \\      src/ElectionSpace.sol:ElectionSpace \\      --rpc-url $BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL \\      --etherscan-api-key $BASESCAN_API_KEY \\      --constructor-args $(cast abi-encode \"constructor(address,address,uint256,uint256)\" <REGISTRY_ADDRESS> <SPACE_ADMIN_ADDRESS> <SPACE_ID> <CANDIDATE_COUNT>) \\      --watch  ================================================================================= TIPS & PENYELASAIAN MASALAH (TROUBLESHOOTING): ================================================================================= - Pastikan BASESCAN_API_KEY Anda sudah benar dan aktif. - Jika verifikasi gagal dengan pesan \"Contract already verified\", berarti bytecodenya   sudah ter-verify secara otomatis saat Anda menjalankan `--verify` pada perintah deploy.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"script/VerifyVoteChainMVP.s.sol":"VerifyVoteChainMVP"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"script/VerifyVoteChainMVP.s.sol":{"keccak256":"0xef8a242760889606e15e31a3421c39ffba38da40500eb8ca3f5ceddfe81292ce","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://3192e0ce0869e06ceb52c414fa99f6f71c17baaf547b6e5480ef1f4864e933f5","dweb:/ipfs/QmdAjesETSuCAvSztWo2hLBMG4f6VQEcq466UHe9RkfDtH"]}},"version":1}
